reasoning: The control SI-2 (3) focuses on flaw remediation and benchmarks for corrective actions. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that automatic patch management is enforced via admission controllers, tracking flaw remediation through audit logs, monitoring network policy changes, and configuring automatic upgrades for the API server. These actions collectively ensure timely remediation of flaws and adherence to security benchmarks.
title: Flaw Remediation | Time to Remediate Flaws and Benchmarks for Corrective Actions
